title: Verify that the 'HISTORY' tab is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'HISTORY' tab.
expected_result: The 'HISTORY' tab is displayed with a list of previously searched terms and their Hindi translations.

title: Verify that the 'CLEAR ALL' button clears all history entries
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'HISTORY' tab. | Click on the 'CLEAR ALL' button.
expected_result: All history entries are cleared from the 'HISTORY' tab.

title: Verify that a history entry can be deleted
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'HISTORY' tab. | Locate the history entry for the word 'ROUSE'. | Click on the trash icon next to the 'ROUSE' entry.
expected_result: The 'ROUSE' entry is removed from the 'HISTORY' tab.

title: Verify that the 'HISTORY' tab is empty after clearing all entries
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'HISTORY' tab. | Click on the 'CLEAR ALL' button. | Verify that the 'HISTORY' tab is empty.
expected_result: The 'HISTORY' tab is empty after clearing all entries.

title: Verify that the 'HISTORY' tab is accessible and usable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'HISTORY' tab. | Verify that all elements are accessible and usable.
expected_result: All elements in the 'HISTORY' tab are accessible and usable.
